diagrams.title: Gradient Vector Field
diagrams.description: Shows gradient arrows at various points on a contour plot
elements: Gradient arrows perpendicular to contours pointing outward
diagrams.purpose: Visualize that gradient is perpendicular to level curves and points in steepest ascent direction

diagrams.title: Quadratic Function Contours
diagrams.description: Elliptical contours of f(x) = xᵀAx with symmetric positive definite A
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate gradient of quadratic form and how Hessian relates to contour shape

diagrams.title: Gradient Descent Path
diagrams.description: Trajectory of gradient descent on a convex function
diagrams.purpose: Show how negative gradient direction leads to local minimum

diagrams.title: Critical Point Classification
diagrams.description: Three types of critical points with their Hessians
elements: Local minimum with positive definite Hessian
Local maximum with negative definite Hessian
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how Hessian determines nature of critical points
